title: microtoena delavayi var. vera
intro: Microtoena delavayi var. vera, commonly known as the Delavayi var. vera mint, is a variant of the Microtoena delavayi plant, a type of flowering plant in the mint family (Lamiaceae). This plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties. The health benefits of Delavayi var. vera mint include reducing symptoms of digestive issues, relieving headaches and migraines, and lowering blood pressure, due to its flavonoids, phenolic acids, and terpenoids content. Traditionally, the plant is prepared as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, which can be used to promote relaxation, reduce stress, and improve overall well-being.
